'''Nodon''' was a [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]] poacher and hunter. Along with his brother [[Nonak]] and a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] deserter named [[Burrk]], they tried to hunt [[Wampa/Legends|wampas]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] (which was highly illegal) in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], but were killed by them.

{{Char-stub}}
